name: Xinhuanet Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinhuanet Co., Ltd. operates a news information service portal in China. The company publishes news from 31 local channels; and from English, French, Russian, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, German, Portuguese, Tibetan, Victoria, and Mongolian language channels. It also provides online advertising and brand planning services; Website feed and big data intelligent analysis services; Website construction and technical services; and mobile Internet services. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China. Xinhuanet Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Xinhua News Agency.
